info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 10.57 zmiw ityatra 'zmiN anAdara ityeke; NittvasyAvayave'caritArTatvARRijantAttaN' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti  asmin DAtO vidyamAnasya itsaMjYaka-NakArasya sAmarTyAt asya DAtoH kevalam AtmanepadasyEva rUpARi Bavanti iti asya nirdeSasya ASayaH
